summary: Iteration 190: KPI Dashboard - Confidence Score & Analytics. All 15 backend tests passed. Frontend verified: Dashboard KPI page loads correctly with all components (overview cards, accuracy gauge, trend chart, marginalita chart, fornitori section). Sidebar shows 'Dashboard KPI' link under Commerciale group with Target icon.
critical_code_review_comments: KPI Dashboard backend correctly implements 7 endpoints with proper authentication (401 without auth)
All endpoints exclude MongoDB _id from responses
Frontend handles empty data gracefully with appropriate empty state messages
Accuracy gauge shows '—' when score_globale is null (no data)
Trend chart shows 'Dati insufficienti' message when no trend data available
Marginalita and Fornitori sections show appropriate empty state messages

test_credentials.note: Test sessions cleaned up after testing

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 190 tested the KPI Dashboard module - Confidence Score & Analytics. Key findings: (1) All 6 KPI endpoints require authentication and return 401 without auth. (2) GET /api/kpi/overview returns counts (commesse_totali, commesse_chiuse, preventivi_totali, preventivi_predittivi, fatture_emesse, cl_attivi, cl_totali) and fatturato_totale. (3) GET /api/kpi/accuracy-score returns score_globale (can be null), score_ore, score_costi, confronti array, and top_scostamenti. (4) GET /api/kpi/trend-accuracy returns trend array with mese/accuracy/commesse. (5) GET /api/kpi/marginalita returns commesse with margins (importo, costo_manodopera, costo_materiali, costo_totale, margine, margine_pct). (6) GET /api/kpi/ritardi-fornitori returns fornitori stats (fornitore, totali, rientrati, in_corso, giorni_medi, tipi). (7) GET /api/kpi/tempi-medi returns tipologie dict with ore_per_ton. (8) Frontend KPIDashboard.js has proper data-testid attributes for all major components. (9) Sidebar shows 'Dashboard KPI' link with Target icon under Commerciale group.

KPIDashboard.overview_cards: ✓ 7 stat cards (Commesse, Preventivi AI, Fatturato, Fatture, C/L Attivi, Score Ore, Score Costi)
KPIDashboard.accuracy_card: ✓ Confidence Score AI card with data-testid='accuracy-card'
KPIDashboard.trend_card: ✓ Trend Accuratezza nel Tempo with data-testid='trend-card'
KPIDashboard.empty_states: ✓ All sections show appropriate empty state messages when no data

DashboardLayout_Sidebar.dashboard_kpi_link: ✓ Visible under Commerciale group with data-testid='nav-kpi'
